# Appgate

## RSA 2026
-   **Booth number and hall:** Appgate is located at Booth S-343 in the South Expo Hall.
-   **Any updated booth info from the conference floor:** Appgate is showcasing how enterprises are modernizing access without compromising performance, resilience, or control. They are engaging with attendees through live demos and in-depth discussions, focusing on securing AI, hybrid environments, and modern access with their direct-routed Universal ZTNA.

## Company Profile
-   **Employee count (approximate):** Appgate has approximately 377 employees as of February 2026. Other sources indicate around 415 employees as of 2022 or 411 currently.
